welcome.subject: [ES] thanks for trying PickupRoster, {{firstName}}
welcome.preview: [ES] a quick note from the founder — and a small ask.
welcome.para1: [ES] Thank you for signing up. Helping schools run a calmer pickup is the whole reason I started PickupRoster, so it genuinely means a lot that {{orgName}} gave it a shot.
welcome.para2: [ES] I'd love to hear what dismissal actually looks like at your school right now — what's working, what's not, and what you wish someone would fix. Could we grab 15 minutes on the phone in the next week or two?
welcome.para3: [ES] Just hit reply with a couple of times that work for you and I'll send an invite.
welcome.para4: [ES] Either way, I'm glad you're here.

passwordReset.subject: [ES] Reset your PickupRoster password
passwordReset.preview: [ES] Use this link to choose a new password.
passwordReset.intro: [ES] We got a request to reset the password for your PickupRoster account. Click the button below to choose a new one.
passwordReset.fallbackPrefix: [ES] Or paste this link into your browser:
passwordReset.didNotRequest: [ES] If you didn't request this, you can ignore this email — your password won't change{{requestIpSuffix}}.
passwordReset.textIntro: [ES] We got a request to reset the password for your PickupRoster account. Use the link below to choose a new one:

midTrialCheckin.subject: [ES] how's pickup going, {{firstName}}?
midTrialCheckin.preview: [ES] checking in — no agenda, just want to make sure it's useful.
midTrialCheckin.para1: [ES] You're about halfway through your trial. I wanted to check in — not to sell you anything, just to see how it's going.
midTrialCheckin.para2: [ES] If something's confusing, clunky, or missing, hit reply and tell me. I read every email and I'd rather hear it now than not at all.
midTrialCheckin.para3: [ES] If you want to poke around some more, you can jump back in here: {{appLink}}
midTrialCheckin.para3Html: [ES] If you want to poke around some more, you can jump back in here: {{appLink}}

seven.subject: [ES] a week left on your PickupRoster trial
seven.preview: [ES] {{daysLeft}} days to keep your setup — here's how.
seven.para1: [ES] Quick heads up: your trial ends on {{trialEndDate}}, about a week from now.
seven.para2: [ES] If pickup has felt a little less chaotic at {{orgName}} lately, that's the thing worth keeping. Upgrading now means no interruption, your roster stays put, and tomorrow's dismissal runs exactly like today's.
seven.para3: [ES] You can upgrade in a couple of clicks here: {{appLink}}
seven.para3Html: [ES] You can upgrade in a couple of clicks here: {{appLink}}

three.subject: [ES] 3 days left, {{firstName}}
three.preview: [ES] don't want you to lose your setup at {{orgName}}.
three.para1: [ES] Your trial wraps on {{trialEndDate}} — just 3 days out.
three.para2: [ES] I don't want you to lose the setup you've built for {{orgName}}, or wake up next week to a dismissal line that's back to the old way. Upgrading takes about a minute and everything keeps running.
three.para4: [ES] If there's a reason you're holding off, tell me. I want to know.

one.subject: [ES] your trial ends tomorrow
one.preview: [ES] one click to keep PickupRoster running at {{orgName}}.
one.para1: [ES] Your trial ends tomorrow. To keep PickupRoster running at {{orgName}} without a gap, upgrade here: {{appLink}}
one.para1Html: [ES] Your trial ends tomorrow. To keep PickupRoster running at {{orgName}} without a gap, upgrade here: {{appLink}}
